query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS recipe_versions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  recipe_id VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  recipe_type ENUM('final', 'semifinished') NOT NULL,
  version_number INT NOT NULL,
  snapshot JSON NOT NULL,
  changed_by VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  change_description TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_recipe (recipe_id, recipe_type),
  INDEX idx_created (created_at)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user AQnpkq2FC6cpfGo.root --database UyJAnBG4RdjFPnrCDJUrf4 --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS recipe_versions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  recipe_id VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  recipe_type ENUM('final', 'semifinished') NOT NULL,
  version_number INT NOT NULL,
  snapshot JSON NOT NULL,
  changed_by VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  change_description TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_recipe (recipe_id, recipe_type),
  INDEX idx_created (created_at)
);
